ddls:
CREATE TABLE "api_endpoints" (
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API endpoint */,
  "method" TEXT /* HTTP method used by the endpoint */,
  "path" TEXT /* URL path for the endpoint */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the endpoint's functionality */,
  "response_format" TEXT /* Expected format of the response */,
  "example" TEXT /* Example usage of the endpoint */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the API version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the endpoint was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the endpoint */,
  "deprecation_date" TEXT /* Date when the endpoint is deprecated */,
  "rate_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of requests allowed per time period */,
  "rate_limit_period" TEXT /* Time period for rate limiting (e.g., per minute, per hour) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("endpoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_endpoints_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES api_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query parameter */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the API endpoint */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the query parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the query parameter */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the parameter is required */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., string, integer, boolean) */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value if the parameter is not provided */,
  "min_length" INTEGER /* Minimum length for string parameters */,
  "max_length" INTEGER /* Maximum length for string parameters */,
  "min_value" INTEGER /* Minimum value for numeric parameters */,
  "max_value" INTEGER /* Maximum value for numeric parameters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the API */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the API version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the version */,
  "deprecation_date" TEXT /* Date when the version is deprecated */,
  "is_latest" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if this is the latest version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the key */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* The actual API key string */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the API key (e.g., active, revoked) */,
  "issued_date" TEXT /* Date the API key was issued */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the API key */,
  "last_used_date" TEXT /* Date the API key was last used */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the API key has been used */,
  "rate_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of requests allowed per time period */,
  "rate_limit_period" TEXT /* Time period for rate limiting (e.g., per minute, per hour) */,
  "allowed_endpoints" TEXT /* JSON array of endpoint IDs this key is allowed to access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_keys_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage log entry */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the API endpoint */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the endpoint */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "request_count" INTEGER /* Number of requests made */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Average response time */,
  "error_rate" REAL /* Error rate */,
  "request_method" TEXT /* HTTP method used for the request */,
  "request_body" TEXT /* JSON string of the request body */,
  "response_body" TEXT /* JSON string of the response body */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the response */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user making the request */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES api_endpoints ("endpoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_responses" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error response */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the API endpoint */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Error code */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the error */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the error response was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the error response */,
  "example_response" TEXT /* Example JSON response for the error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_responses_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES api_endpoints ("endpoint_id")
)
